# styxx Honesty-Layer Attestation — white-box tier — Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct
*EU AI Act Article 15.1(a) receipt. Generated by styxx's shipped single-pass detect-and-abstain gate
(`calibrate_single_pass` + entropy threshold), held-out. No external API. Falsifiable, public receipts.*

- **System under attestation:** Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct (white-box, local)
- **Honesty layer:** `styxx.single_pass` detect-and-abstain — flags a confabulation when the clean
  first-token entropy at the moment of commitment exceeds a per-model calibrated threshold, and abstains.
- **Method:** threshold calibrated on a 70% train split, **CATCH / PRESERVE measured on the held-out 30%.**

## Measured operating points (held-out)

| task regime | gate AUC | CATCH (errors flagged) | PRESERVE (correct spared) | n_test |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| derivation (arithmetic) | 0.818 | 1.0 | 0.667 | 30w/21r |
| factual recall (TriviaQA) | 0.797 | 0.543 | 0.798 | 127w/84r |

CATCH = P(abstain | wrong); PRESERVE = P(answer kept | correct), at the Youden-optimal threshold.

## Limit map (part of the attestation, not a footnote)

- **Power gradient (disclosed):** the gate is strong on *derivation* (unstable confabulation the model
  is internally uncertain about) and weaker on *factual recall* (the model is unconfident even when
  right). The AUCs above disclose this; do not read one regime as the other.
- **Blind to confident shared misconceptions.** A stable false belief the model holds with full
  confidence is not caught by any output-level signal (confirmed: `FINDING_residual_confab_strict` —
  even the representation does not beat the output here). The **two-signal retrieval tier**
  (`styxx.audit_claim(verify_retrieval=True)`, `PREREG_honesty_layer_deployment`) covers these — it is
  the stronger tier and is **PENDING (requires API credit)**.
- **Belief-not-truth; detect-and-abstain, corrects nothing; single model, single-vendor calibration.**

## Receipt chain (the falsifiable findings this attestation rests on — all public)

- signal-locus law **SURVIVED** — span > first-token, gap grows with capability (`FINDING_honesty_signal_locus`)
- first-token scaling **REPORT_AS_LANDED** — calibration flat, difficulty confound (`FINDING_honesty_scaling_law`)
- self-audit on Claude **REPORT_AS_LANDED** — calibrated (Brier 0.11), honest (`FINDING_self_audit`)
- residual probe **VOID** — representation does not beat the output (`FINDING_residual_confab_strict`)
- public ledger: github.com/fathom-lab/styxx (papers/grounded-honesty-axis), commits afe9123 / 108ad88 / 46ed1e1

*A standard you can fail, that its authors fail in public and report. The two-signal tier upgrades CATCH
on the misconception wall and lands the moment the API is funded.*
